title: NHSRC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Various Lead Consultant Posts
description: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has issued the official notification for the recruitment of various Lead Consultant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in MBBS, BDS, MD/ MS, or MBA can use this opportunity and apply for the NHSRC Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online by the last date of application. If...
